text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Submitter states that fdimage.exe 1.2 is supplied in binary and source 
forms on the 2.2.7 CD; but version 1.5 is only in source form.  The 
latter worked, after being compiled. 

The 1.5, rather than 1.2, binary needs to appear on future CD (jkh 
advised).
